title: Natural disaster support
description: Find support following a natural disaster event, such as bushfire, cyclone, drought, earthquake, flood, landslide or storm.
keywords: storm, flood, bush, fire, extreme, weather, fires, storms, bushfires, disaster, lost, natural disaster, disasters, disaster assist, natural disaster help, Drought, disaster support, natural disaster, disaster help, help in disasters, ATO number disaster, ATO help, ATO disaster help, disaster scams, scams, assistance, relief, extension, cyclone, tornado

child_links.title: Overview of natural disaster support
child_links.description: How we can help if you're affected by natural disaster like a bushfire, cyclone, drought, earthquake, flood, landslide or storm.

child_links.title: Recovery following natural disasters
child_links.description: Consider insurance payouts, repairs and rebuilding, fuel tax credits, donations and fundraising.

child_links.title: Reporting natural disaster payments and grants in your tax return
child_links.description: Find out if you need to report disaster payments and grants in your tax return and if you need to pay tax on them.
